title: Twin-Pack 34cm Heavy Gauge Aluminium Baking Tray Set - Teflon™ Non-Stick Roasting Trays for Oven - Durable, Dishwasher Safe, Multi-Purpose Oven Trays & Bakeware by KITCHENEUR®
features: ESSENTIAL 2-PACK BAKING TRAY SET – Includes two 34cm x 24.5cm x 2cm oven trays, perfect for baking, roasting, and grilling. An essential bakeware set for every kitchen.

OVEN SAFE & HIGH HEAT RESISTANT – Made from 0.4mm durable aluminium, these baking trays for oven non stick withstand temperatures up to 230°C/450°F, ensuring even heat distribution for perfect cooking results.
DISHWASHER SAFE & EASY CLEANING – No scrubbing required! These oven baking trays non stick are dishwasher-safe, ensuring an effortless cleaning experience.
NON-STICK TEFLON COATING – These non-stick baking trays for oven feature a high-performance Teflon coating, making food release effortless and baking & roasting stress-free.
STACKABLE & SPACE-SAVING DESIGN – These deep roasting trays are nestable & compact, keeping your kitchen accessories organized and clutter-free.
description: Product Description The Finest from Britain This product has been designed, manufactured, and packaged in the UK. We support the local economy and always use local suppliers where possible. We are enthusiastic about cookware and bakeware. Our products have been constantly refined with the finest materials and careful consideration of use in the real world. 2-Pack Heavy Gauge 34cm Baking Tray Set This is made from a remarkable 0.8mm premium heavy gauge carbon steel which allows heat to be distributed more evenly for perfect cooking results. It feels durable, and has been finished in with a Teflon coating to aid with its non-stick properties. The dimensions of these oven trays are approximately 34cm x 24.5cm x 2cm . Your pack of two baking trays will help you cook small or large volumes without any problem, for those get-togethers. 34.5cm x 24.5cm x 2cm Dishwasher Safe Suitable up to 230°C / 450°F / Gas Mark 8 Teflon Non-Stick Baking Tray 2-Pack Baking Tray Set Heavy Gauge 0.9mm Thickness in Construction
